An application for reading and displaying ambient light sensor data with optional test result recording.

# Purpose
The code is an application for a Pebble device that measures and displays ambient light levels. It uses the Pebble SDK to create a user interface with a window and text layers to show the ambient light sensor (ALS) readings. The application initializes by creating a window and two text layers: one for the title "ALS" and another for displaying the current light level. The [`prv_update_reading`](<#prv_update_reading>) function retrieves the light level using the `ambient_light_get_light_level` function and updates the display. The application uses a timer to periodically update the light level reading every 500 milliseconds.

The code includes conditional compilation to record test results if the `MFG_INFO_RECORDS_TEST_RESULTS` macro is defined. This feature uses the `mfg_info_write_als_result` function to log the latest ALS value. The application lifecycle is managed by [`prv_handle_init`](<#prv_handle_init>) and [`prv_handle_deinit`](<#prv_handle_deinit>) functions, which handle resource allocation and cleanup. The [`prv_main`](<#prv_main>) function serves as the entry point, setting up the application and entering the event loop. The [`mfg_als_app_get_info`](<#mfg_als_app_get_info>) function provides metadata about the application, including its main function and name, for integration with the Pebble process management system.

- `mfg_als_app.h`
- `applib/app.h`
- `applib/ui/app_window_stack.h`
- `applib/ui/text_layer.h`
- `drivers/ambient_light.h`
- `kernel/pbl_malloc.h`
- `mfg/mfg_info.h`
- `mfg/results_ui.h`
- `process_management/pebble_process_md.h`
- `process_state/app_state/app_state.h`
- `stdint.h`
- `stdio.h`


# Data Structures

---
### AmbientLightAppData
- **Type**: ``struct``
- **Members**:
    - ``window``: Pointer to a `Window` object for the application interface.
    - ``title_text_layer``: Pointer to a `TextLayer` for displaying the title text.
    - ``reading_text_layer``: Pointer to a `TextLayer` for displaying the ambient light reading.
    - ``ambient_reading``: Character array to store the ambient light reading as a string.
    - ``latest_als_value``: Unsigned 32-bit integer to store the latest ambient light sensor value.
    - ``results_ui``: Conditional member for manufacturing results UI, included if `MFG_INFO_RECORDS_TEST_RESULTS` is defined.
- **Description**: Stores data related to the ambient light application, including UI components and the latest ambient light sensor reading. It conditionally includes a manufacturing results UI component based on compile-time configuration.


# Functions

---
### prv\_update\_reading<!-- {{#callable:prv_update_reading}} -->
[View Source →](<../../../../../../src/fw/apps/prf_apps/mfg_als_app.c#L44>)

Updates the ambient light reading in the `AmbientLightAppData` structure.
- **Inputs**:
    - `data`: A pointer to an `AmbientLightAppData` structure where the ambient light reading and latest ALS value will be updated.
- **Logic and Control Flow**:
    - Call `ambient_light_get_light_level()` to get the current ambient light level.
    - Format the light level as a string and store it in `data->ambient_reading` using `snprintf()`.
    - Update `data->latest_als_value` with the current light level.
- **Output**: No return value; updates the `ambient_reading` and `latest_als_value` fields of the `AmbientLightAppData` structure.


---
### prv\_timer\_callback<!-- {{#callable:prv_timer_callback}} -->
[View Source →](<../../../../../../src/fw/apps/prf_apps/mfg_als_app.c#L50>)

Executes a periodic update of ambient light readings and refreshes the display layer.
- **Inputs**:
    - ``cb_data``: A pointer to callback data, which is not used in this function.
- **Logic and Control Flow**:
    - Retrieve user data of type `AmbientLightAppData` using `app_state_get_user_data()`.
    - Call `prv_update_reading(data)` to update the ambient light reading.
    - Mark the root layer of the window as dirty using `layer_mark_dirty(window_get_root_layer(data->window))` to trigger a redraw.
    - Register the callback `prv_timer_callback` to be called again after 500 milliseconds using `app_timer_register(500, prv_timer_callback, NULL)`.
- **Output**: No direct output; it updates the ambient light reading and refreshes the display.
- **Functions Called**:
    - [`prv_update_reading`](<#prv_update_reading>)


---
### prv\_record\_als\_reading<!-- {{#callable:prv_record_als_reading}} -->
[View Source →](<../../../../../../src/fw/apps/prf_apps/mfg_als_app.c#L60>)

Records the latest ambient light sensor (ALS) reading into manufacturing information.
- **Inputs**: None
- **Logic and Control Flow**:
    - Get the user data of type `AmbientLightAppData` using `app_state_get_user_data()`.
    - Call `mfg_info_write_als_result()` with the `latest_als_value` from the retrieved `AmbientLightAppData`.
- **Output**: No output is returned as the function has a `void` return type.


---
### prv\_handle\_init<!-- {{#callable:prv_handle_init}} -->
[View Source →](<../../../../../../src/fw/apps/prf_apps/mfg_als_app.c#L66>)

Initializes the ambient light sensor application by setting up the user interface and starting a timer for periodic updates.
- **Inputs**: None
- **Logic and Control Flow**:
    - Allocate memory for `AmbientLightAppData` and assign it to `data`.
    - Create a new window and assign it to `data->window`.
    - Get the root layer of the window and adjust its bounds for the title text layer.
    - Create a title text layer with the adjusted bounds, set its font, text, and alignment, and add it to the window's root layer.
    - Adjust the bounds for the reading text layer and create it.
    - Call `prv_update_reading(data)` to update the ambient light reading.
    - Set the font, text, and alignment for the reading text layer and add it to the window's root layer.
    - If `MFG_INFO_RECORDS_TEST_RESULTS` is defined, initialize the manufacturing results UI and set a callback for recording ALS readings.
    - Set the `data` as the user data for the application state.
    - Push the window onto the application window stack.
    - Register a timer with a 10 ms delay to call `prv_timer_callback`.
- **Output**: No direct output; initializes the application state and UI components.
- **Functions Called**:
    - [`window_create`](<../../applib/ui/window.c.md#window_create>)
    - [`text_layer_create`](<../../applib/ui/text_layer.c.md#text_layer_create>)
    - [`text_layer_set_font`](<../../applib/ui/text_layer.c.md#text_layer_set_font>)
    - [`text_layer_set_text`](<../../applib/ui/text_layer.c.md#text_layer_set_text>)
    - [`text_layer_set_text_alignment`](<../../applib/ui/text_layer.c.md#text_layer_set_text_alignment>)
    - [`text_layer_get_layer`](<../../applib/ui/text_layer.c.md#text_layer_get_layer>)
    - [`prv_update_reading`](<#prv_update_reading>)
    - [`mfg_results_ui_init`](<../../mfg/results_ui.c.md#mfg_results_ui_init>)
    - [`mfg_results_ui_set_callback`](<../../mfg/results_ui.c.md#mfg_results_ui_set_callback>)


---
### prv\_handle\_deinit<!-- {{#callable:prv_handle_deinit}} -->
[View Source →](<../../../../../../src/fw/apps/prf_apps/mfg_als_app.c#L102>)

Releases resources and memory associated with the `AmbientLightAppData` structure.
- **Inputs**: None
- **Logic and Control Flow**:
    - Retrieve the `AmbientLightAppData` pointer using `app_state_get_user_data()`.
    - Destroy the `title_text_layer` using `text_layer_destroy()`.
    - Destroy the `reading_text_layer` using `text_layer_destroy()`.
    - Destroy the `window` using `window_destroy()`.
    - Free the memory allocated for `AmbientLightAppData` using `task_free()`.
- **Output**: No output is returned as the function is of type `void`.
- **Functions Called**:
    - [`text_layer_destroy`](<../../applib/ui/text_layer.c.md#text_layer_destroy>)
    - [`window_destroy`](<../../applib/ui/window.c.md#window_destroy>)


---
### prv\_main<!-- {{#callable:prv_main}} -->
[View Source →](<../../../../../../src/fw/apps/prf_apps/mfg_als_app.c#L110>)

Initializes the application, enters the event loop, and then deinitializes the application.
- **Inputs**: None
- **Logic and Control Flow**:
    - Calls `prv_handle_init()` to initialize the application, which sets up the window, text layers, and starts a timer for ambient light readings.
    - Enters the main application event loop by calling `app_event_loop()`, which processes events and keeps the application running.
    - Calls `prv_handle_deinit()` to clean up resources, destroy the window and text layers, and free allocated memory.
- **Output**: No output is returned as the function is of type `void`.
- **Functions Called**:
    - [`prv_handle_init`](<#prv_handle_init>)
    - [`prv_handle_deinit`](<#prv_handle_deinit>)


---
### mfg\_als\_app\_get\_info<!-- {{#callable:mfg_als_app_get_info}} -->
[View Source →](<../../../../../../src/fw/apps/prf_apps/mfg_als_app.c#L116>)

Returns a pointer to a static `PebbleProcessMdSystem` structure containing metadata for the ambient light sensor application.
- **Inputs**: None
- **Logic and Control Flow**:
    - Defines a static `PebbleProcessMdSystem` structure named `s_ambient_light_info` with `main_func` set to `prv_main` and `name` set to "MfgALS".
    - Casts the address of `s_ambient_light_info` to a `const PebbleProcessMd*` type.
    - Returns the casted pointer.
- **Output**: A pointer to a `PebbleProcessMd` structure containing the application's metadata.
